instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Industry standards and methodologies include SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), with architecture description languages (ADLs) such as ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and SysML IBDs for component and connector modeling.
